title: Briful 8in Magnolias Christmas Flowers Glittering Magnolia Flowers Artificial 6Pcs Gray Silver Magnolia Stems for Christmas Tree Decorations, Wreaths, Garland Real Touch Magnolia Xmas Picks
features: STUNNING 8-INCH BLOSSOMS WITH GLITTER ACCENTS: Our magnolia Christmas flowers feature eye-catching 8-inch blossoms, generously dusted with glitter（shiny sequin accents）on the petals(tips) and flower centers. The shimmer captures light beautifully, making these Xmas flowers a standout in any holiday arrangement, whether on a wreath or as part of a Christmas tree decoration.

PREMIUM QUALITY AND REALISTIC DESIGN: Crafted with attention to detail, these magnolias Christmas flowers offer a lifelike appearance, giving your holiday decor a touch of natural elegance. The soft, velvety petals combined with the shimmering glitter provide a perfect blend of sophistication and festive cheer.

VERSATILE 7-INCH STEM FOR EASY DECORATING: The 7-inch flexible stem allows for endless possibilities when it comes to decorating. Use these Christmas magnolias flowers to add flair to your Christmas tree, garlands, or centerpieces. The sturdy stem makes it easy to shape and style the flowers however you desire.

PERFECT FOR DIY CHRISTMAS DECOR PROJECTS: These magnolia flowers are a favorite for DIY enthusiasts. Whether you’re creating a custom wreath, a table centerpiece, or adding them to your holiday floral arrangement, the set of 6 pieces gives you plenty of flexibility to design something unique and stunning.

TIMELESS ELEGANCE FOR ANY HOLIDAY THEME: With their classic design and glittering finish, these magnolia flowers seamlessly complement any holiday theme—whether it’s traditional, modern, or vintage-inspired. Their large size and sparkling accents make them a perfect focal point for your festive decor.
description: Add a touch of festive elegance to your holiday decor with our set of 6 magnolia Christmas flowers. Each flower boasts a large 8-inch blossom with intricate glitter detailing on the petals and center, capturing the light to create a dazzling display. Standing on a sturdy 7-inch stem, these versatile flowers are perfect for decorating wreaths, garlands, centerpieces, or Christmas trees. The high-quality, lifelike design adds instant holiday charm, transforming any space into a winter wonderland. Package: 6 piece of Magnolia Christmas Flowers Material: Glitter and Velvet，Iron and Plastic. Stem Size: approx. from 7" Perfect home decoration for Christmas parties, easily hung from tree branches or used for garlands, decorations, and more.
